name: Bye Bye View
summary: A tiny Bye Bye panel for Locus View plugin publishing tests.

summaryI18n.zh: 用于 Locus View 插件发布测试的简洁 Bye Bye 面板。
summaryI18n.en: A tiny Bye Bye panel for Locus View plugin publishing tests.

author: r1n7aro
description: Bye Bye View provides a compact Locus View that displays a simple goodbye panel. It is intended as a minimal plugin publishing and registry validation sample.

descriptionI18n.zh: Bye Bye View 提供一个紧凑的 Locus View，用于显示简单的 goodbye 面板。它用于最小化验证插件发布和注册表流程。
descriptionI18n.en: Bye Bye View provides a compact Locus View that displays a simple goodbye panel. It is intended as a minimal plugin publishing and registry validation sample.
